imported_candidates_source_item_active_u.name: imported_candidates_source_item_active_unique
imported_candidates_source_item_active_u.where: "imported_candidates"."source_item_id" is not null and "imported_candidates"."status" not in ('rejected', 'archived')

imported_candidates_fingerprint_active_u.name: imported_candidates_fingerprint_active_unique
imported_candidates_fingerprint_active_u.where: "imported_candidates"."content_fingerprint" is not null and "imported_candidates"."status" not in ('rejected', 'archived')

sources_fetch_url_active_unique.name: sources_fetch_url_active_unique
sources_fetch_url_active_unique.where: "sources"."fetch_url" is not null and "sources"."status" not in ('deprecated', 'disabled')
